title: NATR-388 Breastfeeding Teacher's Breastfeeding Guidance Minako Kahara - Minako Hanahara
overview: "Mr. Kahara" who returned to work after childbirth encouraged the dropout boy student with breastfeeding, and rewarded the student who decided to enter by recommendation. Teacher Kahara, who was warned by the principal for overdoing life guidance, was threatened by the principal, saying, "If you want the board of education to keep quiet...", and she was dripping breast milk on the bed.
